context.projectOverview: agent-bober medical knowledge template — lab-ingestion leg. Sprint 2: serialize each parsed lab marker to a markdown note with structured YAML frontmatter under the vault dir, and reindex those notes into the existing HealthDataStore.lab_results. Deterministic JS status (low/normal/high/critical); deterministic labResultId dedup. NO LLM, NO network, NO import of the sibling vault-store module.

completedSprints.title: Lab-PDF -> structured JSON parser
completedSprints.summary: Added src/medical/lab-types.ts (ParsedLabMarker { name, value:number, unit, referenceLow?, referenceHigh?, critical? } + ParsedLabReport { panel, collectedAtIso, markers[] } Zod schemas). REUSE these schemas in Sprint 2 — import from './lab-types.js'. Also added Anthropic-only ChatParams.documents + parseLabPdf() (not needed this sprint).
